payload.answer: SQL execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. The requested query was not run.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable memory should be created from an admin SQL debug command.

details: Rejected /brain admin sql request because debug SQL is disabled.
No memory cards created or modified.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED in the appropriate environment only if authorized.
Use supported non-SQL admin/debug endpoints if available.
